skills.title: Procore content design
skills.description: Apply Procore content design and UX writing standards when creating or reviewing user-facing copy, UI text, conversational AI, or designs.

skills.title: JSON Toolinator extensions
skills.description: Extend Toolinator views with createConfig, createView, formulator, tabulator, and smart-grid patterns.

skills.title: Scaffold blueprint
skills.description: Author a new blueprint directory with the seven JSON files that match bundled examples.

skills.title: Prepare contribution
skills.description: Hand off prototype or blueprint work with a checklist and optional failure report.

skills.title: Load blueprint
skills.description: Hydrate or replace blueprint JSON under blueprints/ using the bundled pull flow.

skills.title: Build Storybook
skills.description: Iterate on Storybook stories for prototype views using yarn scripts.

skills.title: Build full demo
skills.description: Post-install sequence for the complete Toolinator prototype demo (registry, install, validate).
